title: Block Puzzle
description: Drop Tetris-like blocks to fill rows and columns. Clear lines to score points and chain combos. Free online puzzle game, no install needed.

howToUse.label: Drag a piece
howToUse.description: Drag one of the 3 pieces from the tray onto the grid. On mobile, the piece appears above your finger so you can see where you're placing it.

howToUse.label: Fill rows and columns
howToUse.description: Place pieces to fill entire rows or columns. Completed lines clear automatically and earn points.

howToUse.label: Chain combos
howToUse.description: Clear multiple lines in a single placement to trigger a combo bonus. The more lines you chain, the higher the bonus.

howToUse.label: Keep the board clear
howToUse.description: The game ends when none of the 3 pieces can fit anywhere on the board. Think ahead to keep the board open.

faq.question: Can I rotate pieces?
faq.answer: No, pieces cannot be rotated. Plan your placements using the pieces in their fixed orientations.

faq.question: How is the score calculated?
faq.answer: Each placed cell earns 5 points. Each cleared line earns 100 points. Combo bonuses multiply with consecutive line clears.

faq.question: When do I get a new set of pieces?
faq.answer: A new set of 3 pieces appears automatically once all 3 pieces in the current tray have been placed.

faq.question: What causes game over?
faq.answer: The game ends when none of the remaining pieces in the tray can be placed anywhere on the board.
